h9.implication: Operationalization flawed; needs independent co-occurrence measure from held-out corpus

h10.key_finding: Random SAE shows 8x higher absorption than trained SAE (0.278 vs 0.034)
h10.implication: Chanin metric is not specific to learned structure; report as methodological finding
